name: Messaging Strategist
description: Evaluates pharma value propositions for commercial messaging excellence: Challenge-Solution-Outcome narrative structure, patient-centric language, audience segmentation, and readability metrics. Activated only in value_proposition query mode.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Challenge-Solution-Outcome Narrative Check
skills.description: Evaluates presence of the three messaging pillars: Challenge keywords ('challenge', 'problem', 'burden', 'unmet'), Solution keywords ('solution', 'addresses', 'offers', 'provides', 'enables'), Outcome keywords ('outcome', 'result', 'improvement', 'benefit', 'reduction'). Each pillar scored independently.
examples: Check if the Bayer product value proposition follows Challenge→Solution→Outcome structure

skills.name: Patient-Centricity Score
skills.description: Measures patient-focused language density: 'patient', 'quality of life', 'qol', 'symptom', 'burden', 'daily living', 'caregiver', 'adherence', 'convenience'. High (5+) vs clinical-only (0) language.

skills.name: Audience Segmentation Review
skills.description: Detects audience-specific language: 'hcp', 'physician', 'payer', 'patient', 'formulary', 'reimbursement', 'guideline', 'protocol'. Multi-segment (4+) vs mono-audience (0-1).

skills.name: Readability Metrics
skills.description: Computes sentence-level readability: average sentence length (words/sentence). Optimal = 15-20 words/sentence. Very long (>25) or very short (<10) sentences flagged for messaging clarity.
